name: Baotailong New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Baotailong New Materials Co., Ltd. provides coal chemical, clean energy, new material, and other products in China. The company produces coal tar, coke, coarse benzene, ammonium sulfate, washing foams, graphite papers, methanol, LPG, liquid oxygen and nitrogen, hydrocarbon, asphalt harmony products, graphene oxide powder and slurry, and graphene electrothermal films, as well as needle coke and building blocks. It is also involved in power and heat supply activities. The company was formerly known as Qitaihe Baotailong Coal & Coal Chemicals Public Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Baotailong New Materials Co., Ltd. in June 2016. Baotailong New Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Qitaihe, China.
